mentions.note: Matched SSS at 4.1%, small revenue beat, inline earnings +8% YoY; declined to raise FY guidance citing higher fuel and consumer pressure. Stock tumbled 7.2% despite solid execution; valuation sky-high relative to growth; pullback may present buying opportunity.
Revamped into great company for all income levels; excellent natural food section; terrific numbers expected; often overlooked by snobs.
Holds price line vs. inflation; won't disappoint customers; among retail winners rallying today as inflation pushes consumers toward discount retailers.
